title: leucanthemum vulgare subsp. atratum
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. atratum, commonly known as the field daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, with dark, purple-colored flowers. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. atratum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
